GdnIceFirePayoutAndRulesShared.Rule1_19_Payout1_2: Wild symbol substitutes for all symbols except Free Spins symbol.
GdnIceFirePayoutAndRulesShared.Rule1_20_Payout1_3: Wild symbol appears on reels 2, 3, 4 and 5 only.
GdnIceFirePayoutAndRulesShared.Rule2_1_Payout2_1: During any main game spin, when 1 or more Wild symbol is involved in any win, all wins are multiplied by x2.
GdnIceFirePayoutAndRulesShared.Rule3_1_Payout3_1: 3, 4, 5 or 6 Free Spins symbols appearing anywhere will trigger the Free Spins Feature with 10, 15, 20 or 25 free spins respectively.
GdnIceFirePayoutAndRulesShared.Rule3_2_Payout3_2: During the Free Spins Feature, an extra reel is added in the middle, which increases the number of winning ways from 576 ways to %{2304} ways. Then, there will be two sets of reels on top and bottom of the screen which will spin at the same time.
GdnIceFirePayoutAndRulesShared.Rule3_3_Payout3_3: If both top and bottom sets of reels have at least one winning bet way respectively, all wins for that free spin will be multiplied by x5, and all wins for the set of reels that has 1 or more Wild symbol involved in any win will be multiplied by x10.
GdnIceFirePayoutAndRulesShared.Rule3_4_Payout3_4: 1 free spin is awarded for each Free Spins symbol appearing on reels.

GdnIceFireRules.Rules1_0: Guardians of Ice & Fire is a 6-reel (2 rows in reels 1 and 6, 3 rows in reels 2 and 5, 4 rows in reels 3 and 4) video slot featuring Free Spins Feature with two sets of reels and win multipliers up to x10.
GdnIceFireRules.Rule1_1: The game is played with 20 base bet for 576 ways (fixed), bet level of 1 to 10 and bet size of %{minChip} to %{maxChip}.
GdnIceFireRules.Rule1_21: Free Spins Feature is played at the same bet size and bet level as the spin that triggered the Free Spins Feature.
